input.raw_query: Ürünün kategorisi yanlış, storefront'ta 'Günlük' yerine 'Diğer' gösteriyor
input.context: product_id=TG-ADI-8812, category field shows unexpected value

flow_steps.query: SELECT automation_meta_raw_caption, automation_meta_parse_warnings FROM products WHERE id='TG-ADI-8812'
SELECT category FROM products WHERE id='TG-ADI-8812'

diagnosis.symptom: Category shows 'Diğer' instead of 'Günlük' on storefront
diagnosis.root_cause: parseTelegramCaption normalization missed 'günlük kullanım' phrase; mapped to fallback category
diagnosis.symptom_vs_root_cause: Symptom is wrong display; root cause may be parser normalization or manual override — needs DB confirmation
